##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Pale blue blocky crystals associated with green conichalcite, R070430, and pale blue granular barahonite-(Al). This is the type sample.

##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070431
